acceptance.assertion: Generated Cabinet references state bundle stem, freshness class, health, and non-claims.
The importer does not claim current live repository state from a dated dump.

goal: Create a Cabinet importer that turns rLens bundle metadata into dated Repository References and optional agent briefings without live-state claims.

metadata.outcome: Implemented in Cabinet PR #86: Cabinet now has a metadata-only rLens/RepoBrief bundle manifest importer that renders dated Repository References and optional bounded agent briefings without live-state claims.
validation: Cabinet PR #86 GitHub CI passed: Repository Contract, Installer Shadow Test, Secret Scan, Validate Ecosystem Map, test, validate.
Local: python3 -m unittest discover -s scripts/tests -p test_rlens_repository_reference_import.py -> 5 passed.
Local: python3 -m unittest discover -s scripts/tests -p test_external*.py -> 9 passed.
Local: cabinet frontier and ecosystem signal focused tests passed.
Local: ./scripts/ci/validate-repository.sh on real Cabinet checkout after merge -> pass.

verified_acceptance.dated-reference: Importer output includes bundle stem, manifest SHA-256, generated timestamp, health status, freshness class, and explicit non-claims.
verified_acceptance.no-live-claim: Rendered references and JSON briefings set/ state live-state non-claim boundaries and do not inspect live Git or claim current repository HEAD.

title: Import rLens references into Cabinet
